zh.lifeSummary: 當Abigail Flagg於1694年4月16日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托時，她的父親Benjamin Flagg31歲，母親Experience Childe25歲。她於1718年1月1日與Gershom Wheelock Sr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1762年10月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼伍斯特史福斯波利享年68歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼伍斯特史福斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Abigail Flagg于1694年4月16日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托时，她的父亲Benjamin Flagg31岁，母亲Experience Childe25岁。她于1718年1月1日与Gershom Wheelock Sr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1762年10月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼伍斯特史福斯波利享年68岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼伍斯特史福斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Flagg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Middle English flag(ge) ‘turf, sod, block of peat’ (Old Norse flag). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived at a place where turves were cut, or toponymic, from a place so named, such as Flagg, Derbyshire. It may also be a nickname for someone who cut turves. Compare Flack .
habitational name from Middle English flagge ‘reed, rush’, for someone who lived in a place characterised by reeds, or perhaps for someone who cut reeds for thatch.
perhaps from Middle English flag(ge) ‘flagstone’ (Old Norse flaga), for someone who lived in a place where flagstones were found or quarried.

variants.name: Flack
meanings: English: from Middle English flak ‘sod, turf, block of peat’ (as found in the placename Flatmoor, in Cambridgeshire, recorded as Flackemore in 1221 ), and hence perhaps a metonymic occupational name for a turf cutter. Compare Flagg 1.

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Abigail Flagg was born on 16 April 1694, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Benjamin Flagg, was 31 and her mother, Experience Childe, was 25. She married Gershom Wheelock Sr. on 1 January 1718, in Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 17 October 1762, in Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 68, and was buried in Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Abigail Flagg est née le 16 avril 1694, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Benjamin Flagg, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Experience Childe, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Gershom Wheelock Sr. le 1 janvier 1718, à Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 octobre 1762, à Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Abigail Flagg am 16. April 1694 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Benjamin Flagg 31 und ihre Mutter Experience Childe 25. Sie hat am 1. Januar 1718 in Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Gershom Wheelock Sr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. Oktober 1762 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Flagg è nata il il 16 aprile 1694 nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Benjamin Flagg, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Experience Childe, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Gershom Wheelock Sr. il 1 gennaio 1718, nel Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 ottobre 1762, nel Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Abigail Flaggが1694年4月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで生まれた時，父Benjamin Flaggは31歳，母Experience Childeは25歳であった。1718年1月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスでGershom Wheelock Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1762年10月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウオルセスターシュリュースブリーで68歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウオルセスターシュリュースブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.lifeSummary: Abigail Flagg(이)가 1694년 4월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Benjamin Flagg(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Experience Childe(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1718년 1월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스에서 Gershom Wheelock Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1762년 10월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 워스스터 슈레w스버이에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 워스스터 슈레w스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Flagg nasceu em 16 de abril de 1694, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Benjamin Flagg, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Experience Childe, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Gershom Wheelock Sr. em 1 de janeiro de 1718, em Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de outubro de 1762, em Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abigail Flagg родилась 16 апреля 1694 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Benjamin Flagg было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Experience Childe, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gershom Wheelock Sr. 1 января 1718 г. в местности эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 17 октября 1762 г. в местности шрюсбури, ворсестир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности шрюсбури, ворсестир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
